_comment: Example JSON envelope produced by `gh-aw-fleet list --output json` AFTER this feature ships. Shows the additive `profile_tiers` and `cost_center` fields on each row. Envelope `schema_version` remains 1. Envelope key set matches cmd/output.go's Envelope struct exactly: schema_version, command, repo, apply, result, warnings, hints (FR-009).

repos._comment_row_1: Repo with two profiles, both having tiers set, and a cost_center set in fleet.local.json.

repos._comment_row_2: Repo with one profile carrying a tier; cost_center unset → empty string (always present per FR-008).

repos._comment_row_3: Repo whose only profile has NO tier set on its underlying Profile definition. profile_tiers is an empty MAP (not null) per FR-007.
